assignment:
## Overview
This grade reflects your day-to-day engagement in lectures, labs, discussions, and observation activities across the full two-week course.
## Evaluation Criteria
- Arrives prepared and on time - Contributes relevant ideas and questions - Engages productively in partner or group work - Participates in field, lab, or simulation activities - Uses marine biology vocabulary and evidence appropriately
## Evidence of Participation
Students should maintain a current lab notebook, respond to prompts during class, and contribute substantively to course discussions.
## Instructor Note
This is a manually recorded grade. No direct submission is required unless the instructor requests supporting evidence.
